name: Valencian
notes: Valencian (Valencià). Western Catalan block, co-official in Comunitat Valenciana. Key differences from Central Catalan: /v/ vs /b/ distinction preserved, apico-alveolar sibilants [s̺, z̺], MINIMAL vowel reduction (no schwa — unstressed /a/ stays [a], /e/ stays [e], /o/ stays [o]). Word-final -r pronounced. Voiced affricate [dʒ] more robust. Regulated by Acadèmia Valenciana de la Llengua (AVL).
